label: 00_config
info:
Global configuration: MQTT broker connection and shared constants.
All flows reference this single broker config node.

label: 01_mqtt_ingestion
info:
Responsibility: Subscribe to UNS MQTT topics and parse raw JSON payloads.
Output: msg.topic (string), msg.payload (parsed object)

label: 02_topic_parser
info:
Responsibility: Extract structured metadata from MQTT topic string.
Output: msg.meta = { namespace, site, system, device, type }

label: 03_ahu_normalization
info:
Responsibility: Transform raw AHU telemetry into a clean domain object.
Output: msg.payload = { meta, telemetry, timestamp }

label: 04_routing
info:
Responsibility: Route messages by system type to correct normalization pipeline.
Current routes: hvac → AHU normalization | future: power, chiller, etc.

name: MQTT Broker — EMQX (Docker service: mqtt-broker:1883)
info:
This broker config is shared by all MQTT IN/OUT nodes across all tabs.
Broker hostname resolves via Docker network: uns-network.
Service name: mqtt-broker (from docker-compose.yaml)
To change broker settings, edit only this node.

name: UNS Topic Convention: uns/{site}/{system}/{device}/{type}
info:
Topic structure:
  uns/         → namespace root
  site01/      → physical or logical site
  hvac/        → system domain
  opta-ahu01/  → device identifier
  telemetry    → message type

Example: uns/site01/hvac/opta-ahu01/telemetry

name: MQTT Ingestion — Subscribe uns/+/+/+/telemetry → Parse JSON → Forward
info:
Input:  Raw MQTT message (UTF-8 string payload)
Output: msg.topic (string), msg.payload (parsed JS object)

name: Extract Topic Metadata
Topic Parser — Split topic string → msg.meta = { namespace, site, system, device, type }
info:
Input:  msg.topic string, msg.payload object
Output: msg.meta object added to message
Drops malformed topics.

name: → Historian Pipeline (stub)
Device Router — msg.meta.system → hvac pipeline | unhandled → debug
info:
Switch routes on msg.meta.system.
Current: hvac → AHU Normalization
Future: power, chiller, lighting

name: Normalize AHU Telemetry
AHU Normalization — Arduino Opta payload → clean domain object
info:
Transforms Arduino Opta AHU payload into a clean domain object.

Input fields (Opta firmware):
  supply_air_temp_c, supply_air_setpoint_c, return_air_temp_c
  chw_temp_in_c, chw_temp_out_c, chw_delta_t_c
  vfd_speed_pct, vfd_setpoint_pct, valve_position_pct
  filter_dp_pa, duct_pressure_pa, co2_ppm
  event_ts, uptime_ms, mode, device
